zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Burgoyne於1423年出生在英國坎布利其爾朗 斯坦頓時，他的父親John Bourgoyne31歲，母親Joan de Peyton29歲。他於1442年與Alice Amelia Tay在英國坎布利其爾坎布利其結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1457年在英國享年34歲。

nameMeanings.name: Burgoyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Middle English Burgoin, Old French Bourgogne, Latin Burgundia), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the West Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404, duke from 1363).

variants.name: Burgin
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from Burgundy, Old French Bourgogne, Bourgoin ‘the Burgundian’. Alternatively, from the synonymous name Burgoyne .
Swiss German (Bürgin): from a pet form of the personal name Burkhard (see Burkhart ).

variants.name: Burgamy
meanings: English (Norfolk): variant of Burgany, itself a variant of Burgoyne (Middle English Bourgoine, Burgonye ‘Burgundy’). This form of the name is now rare or absent in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Burgoyne was born in 1423, in Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, John Bourgoyne, was 31 and his mother, Joan de Peyton, was 29. He married Alice Amelia Tay in 1442, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in 1457, in England, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Burgoyne est né en 1423, à Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, John Bourgoyne, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan de Peyton, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Alice Amelia Tay en 1442, à Canteburge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1457, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Burgoyne(이)가 1423년 영국 캄브리지실르 론그 스탠턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Bourgoyne(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Peyton(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1442년 영국 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 Alice Amelia Tay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1457년 영국에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Burgoyne родился в 1423 г. в местности лонг стантон, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Bourgoyne было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan de Peyton, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Amelia Tay в 1442 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1457 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 34 лет.
